ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a Cypher query?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:ASKED]->(u:User),
    p3 = (q)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer)-[r4:PROVIDED]->(u2:User)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What trends in user engagement have emerged from the most upvoted answers to the question about building a Cypher query, and how do the tagging patterns align with the frequency of question views?

cypher:
MATCH (q:Question {title: 'building a Cypher query'})<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User)
WITH q, u, count(a) AS answerCount, q.viewCount AS viewCount
ORDER BY answerCount DESC
MATCH (q)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag)
RETURN q.title AS questionTitle, q.viewCount AS questionViewCount, collect(t.name) AS tags, answerCount, viewCount
